generated_assessment.reasoning: While her moderate conscientiousness and dutifulness might normally support a baseline openness to defense spending, her very low trust (30th pct) and low openness to ideas (21st pct) suggest skepticism that increased spending would be used wisely, while her emotional stability and low anxiety reduce fear-driven support. Her conventional, practical bent and modest tender-mindedness yield a clear but not intense opposition, landing at -371.
